description: Create a multi-file Talon module for cybersecurity forensics in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\forensics\ consisting of forensics.py and forensics.talon. The Python module must implement actions for: retrieving a selected file path via the clipboard (incorporating a 100ms delay and whitespace stripping); calculating SHA-256 hex digests; and identifying malware signatures by searching the sha256_hash column in C:\workspace\data\malware_bazaar.csv. The module must also include a triage action that triggers a system notification with the signature and appends a log entry to C:\workspace\data\evidence_log.txt, as well as an action for logging timestamped evidence notes. Log entries must use the formats [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS] Path: <path> | Hash: <hash> | Signature: <signature> and [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS] NOTE: <note>. Map the voice commands "triage file" and "evidence note <user.text>" to these actions in the forensics.talon file.
